metadata.title: EMC — Branded Corporate Textiles, Turnkey
metadata.description: Manufacturing, branding and packaging of corporate textiles: caps, t-shirts, polos, uniforms. Full cycle — from idea to delivery.

hero.h1: Branded apparel for your team — from idea to packaging
hero.sub: EMC manufactures, brands and packs corporate textiles: caps, t-shirts, polos and uniforms. The whole cycle — production, logo application, quality audit, packaging and logistics — is on us.

prod.sub: We sew and brand to order — any run, colour and fabric weight.

0.name: Caps
0.desc: Baseball caps, snapbacks and truckers with embroidered or printed logos.

1.name: T-shirts
1.desc: Cotton and synthetics — any weight, colour and fit for your brand.

2.name: Polos
2.desc: Classic and stretch — for office, retail and events.

3.name: Uniforms
3.desc: Workwear and corporate outfits in ready sets.

cycle.sub: You set the task — we run the project from raw materials to a finished, packed batch. One contractor, one contract, full control.

0.title: Manufacturing
0.desc: We source fabric and sew products in the right quality, colour and size.

1.title: Branding
1.desc: We apply your logo: print, embroidery, silkscreen — on brand.

2.title: Quality audit
2.desc: We inspect every batch. Defects never reach the client.

3.title: Packaging
3.desc: We pack and label — the batch is ready to hand out or ship.

4.title: Logistics
4.desc: We deliver the finished, packed batch to your warehouse or pickup points.

why.sub: No need to assemble a chain of factory, print shop, warehouse and logistics. It is all already inside EMC.

0.title: End-to-end
0.desc: One contract and one point of contact for the whole cycle — from sourcing to packaging.

1.title: Quality control
1.desc: Audits at every step. We ship only what passed inspection.

2.title: Deadlines that fit
2.desc: We plan production around your dates — from print run to handout, no slips.

3.title: Any volume
3.desc: From a trial batch to large runs without losing quality.

form.h2: Tell us the task — we will put together an offer
form.sub: We reply within one business day and estimate the run and timeline for your project.
form.name: Name
form.successText: Thank you! We will get in touch within a business day with a quote.

contacts.tagline: Full-cycle corporate textile manufacturing and branding.
